sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Silver Leaf serves no practical purpose other than to be sold.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A strange, silver-colored leaf. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious silver leaf. No trees with this leaf have been found yet.

sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition 1.4.1 Distribution 1.4.1.1 As a held item In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price G S C $ 1000 * $ 500 P E N/A $ 500 Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Silver Leaf serves no practical purpose other than to be sold. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C A strange, silver-colored leaf. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious silver leaf. No trees with this leaf have been found yet. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods G S C Held by wild Tentacruel , wild Rapidash , wild Magneton , wild Kingler , wild Electrode , wild Weezing , and wild Seaking from Generation I P E Gift from Partner Pikachu P or Eevee E Distribution [ edit | edit source ] As a held item [ edit | edit source ] For Pokémon distributed in Generation I games, the Pokémon must be traded to a Generation II game for the item to appear.
